title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Lido Learning - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Lido Learning - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Lido Learning invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Lucknow location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Lido Learning:
Lido Learning is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Support students with special educational needs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lido Learning!
